data.name: The Edge Of
data.detailed_description:
Buy My New Game!


關於此遊戲


《邊緣之外》是一款充滿緊張氛圍和引人入勝的神秘NTR視覺小說。在遊戲中，您可以扮演山姆(Sam)，他正在努力應對妻子可能對他不忠的事實，或者是貝絲(Beth)，這位可愛的妻子不可能對他不忠... 或者她真的對他不忠？


一周的商務旅行後回家，山姆一踏入家門就感覺到事情不太對勁。是因為他的新婚妻子在下午睡覺，而不是急切地等待他的歸來嗎？還是因為她在被質問時表現得相當回避？或者也許只是他疲憊的心靈在作祟？後者似乎是最具說服力的答案，或者他原本是這樣認為的，但當他發現自己凝視著妻子在商務旅行期間發給他的自拍照——一張穿著內衣的自拍照時，他注意到了一些他一開始沒有注意到的東西；照片邊緣有三個不起眼的指尖。


  • 超過120k字的文字
  • 2種不同的視角
  • 2個結局
  • 18+ CG


在這個視覺小說中，您可以選擇扮演山姆——神秘視角——或貝絲，這位可能對他不忠的純潔妻子。通過從山姆的眼睛觀察故事的發展，您將左右為難地想知道貝絲是否陷入了婚外情中，感受到永遠不知道妻子真正意圖的緊張情緒。然而，從貝絲的角度來看... 哦，誰知道呢？

data.short_description: 《邊緣之外》是一款氣氛緊張的神秘NTR視覺小說，故事情節令人緊張不安。扮演Sam，他努力應對妻子可能對他不忠的事實，或者是Beth，這位可愛的妻子，她不可能出軌... 或者她真的出軌了嗎？

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo (64 bit processor)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 650 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720
  • 儲存空間: 650 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280 x 720
  • 儲存空間: 650 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

data.name: The Edge Of
data.detailed_description:
Buy My New Game!


About the Game




The Edge Of is a Mystery NTR visual novel with a tense atmosphere and a story that will keep you on the Edge of your seat. Play as either Sam as he grapples with the fact that his wife might be cheating on him, or Beth, the lovely wife who couldn't possibly be cheating... or is she?


Coming back home after a week-long business trip, Sam can't help but sense that something isn't quite right the moment he set foot inside his house. Is it the fact that his newlywed wife was sleeping in the afternoon rather than waiting impatiently for his return? Or is it because she was rather evasive the moment he questioned her about it? Or maybe it is simply his weary mind playing tricks on him? The latter seems like the most compelling answer, or so he thought, but as he finds himself gazing at a selfie his wife sent him during his business trip--a selfie in her lingerie--he notices something he didn't catch when he first received it; the presence of three inconspicuous fingertips peeking at the edge of the frame.


  • 120k+ Words
  • 2 Different Perspectives
  • 2 Endings
  • 18+ CGs


In this visual novel, you can either play as Sam—the mystery perspective—or Beth, the pure wife who may or may not be cheating. By watching the story unfold from Sam's eyes, you will be left wondering whether Beth is in an adulterous relationship, gripped with the tension of never knowing your wife's true intentions. From Beth's perspective, however... well, who knows, really?
